name: Cinnamon Apple Rolls (Sticky Buns)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, 2 tablespoons sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Add the milk and 1/2 cup Crisco Oil to the dry ingredients. Stir until just combined, forming a dough that holds together when mixed.
3. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead for 10-12 strokes.
4. Roll the dough into a rectangle that is about 1/4 inch thick.
5. Spread half of the brown sugar mixture evenly over the dough, including the apples, cinnamon, and chopped nuts.
6. Roll up the dough into a jelly-roll shape.
7. Slice the roll into 1-inch thick pieces.
8. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
9. In a 13x9-inch baking pan, combine the remaining brown sugar, Crisco Oil, and chopped nuts.
10. Place the rolls in the prepared pan.
11. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
12. Carefully turn each roll upside down onto a serving platter.
13. Serve warm. Makes about 8 rolls.
